calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Steven J. Horn, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN J. HORN, (818) 385-1087,for Plaintiff Geico Insurance Co.
Cesar Diaz, 415-860-5608, diazcesar03@gmail.com, Pro Per Defendant. (Personal appearance)

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PLAINTIFF GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Cesar Ellao Diaz III's claim of exemption is granted in part. The judgment debtor shall remit $345 per month to service the debt. The court will execute a judicial council order that reflects the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
